home.title: Welcome to
home.description: The official lost and found platform for Ted University. Report missing belongings, browse found items, and reclaim what's yours — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: Three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Reuniting students and staff with their belongings as quickly as possible.

browse.title: Browse Announcements
browse.description: Check the latest posts to see if your item has already been turned in or reported by someone on campus.

report.title: Report Your Item
report.description: Lost something or found an item? Sign in and submit a report with a description, location, and photo.

connect.title: Get Connected
connect.description: We match reports and notify both parties so the item can be claimed and collected safely.

banner.title: View Announcements
banner.description: Stay up to date with the most recent lost and found reports across the Ted University campus.

home.footer: Ted University — ISP — University by Clevory
